violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as buns) in the lowboy refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
Inspector observed taquitos being sold in packaging without labels. PIC placed label on product. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
The bulk milk container dispensing tube shall be cut on the diagonal leaving no more than one inch protruding from the chilled dispensing head. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the counters under beverage machines have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

The floors behind beverage machines have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
Inspector observed commercially prepared food items (taquitos and donuts) being sold with without labels. PIC labeled items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves (retail area) and two door freezer unit (back storage area) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
Inspector observed 3 bay sink in poor repair (leaking faucets and from underneath). New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The outside dumpster area and surrounding perimeter of establishment was observed with an accumulation of food debris, litter, and trash. The outside and dumpster area shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The restrooms were observed not clean (overflowing trashcans). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
